creator: hannes@mehnert.org
text:
Thanks for your report again, from my point of view this issue can be closed.

The AAAA DNS entry for opam.ocaml.org was wrong, as it has been discussed in https://github.com/ocaml/infrastructure/issues/42 -- and the maintainers thereof are aware of it (and hopefully will come up with some healthcheck and/or persistent IPv6 address assignment).

I still don't quite understand their setup, but am glad that they solved it.

Would you mind closing this bug? Thanks a lot!
